DbKeeperNet Command Line Interface

Usage:  [options] [command]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information

Commands:
  new               Creates new DbKeeperNet upgrade script

Run ' [command] --help' for more information about a command.

DbKeeperNet Command Line Interface

Usage:  [options] [command]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information

Commands:
  new               Creates new DbKeeperNet upgrade script

Run ' [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates new DbKeeperNet upgrade script

Usage:  new [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  filename          Output file name

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information
  -a | --assembly   Define assembly attribute value
  -v | --version    Sets the update version
  -d | --driver     Database driver [sqlite|mssql|mysql|firebird|all]

commands.payload:
